message:
fix: replace hash-derived dolt ports with OS-assigned ephemeral ports (GH#2415)

Replace DerivePort() (FNV-32a hash into 1000-port range) with OS-assigned
ephemeral ports via net.Listen(":0"). This eliminates birthday-problem
port collisions that caused cross-project data leakage (GH#2098, GH#2372).

DefaultConfig() returns port 0 when no explicit config exists. Start()
allocates an ephemeral port with retry loop for TOCTOU races. Explicit
port config (env var, config.yaml, metadata.json) is preserved unchanged.

Closes #2098. Partially addresses #2372 (Layer 1 — port isolation).

Co-Authored-By: timvisher-dd <timvisher-dd@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
